Table of Contents

Interface IRelQueryTableName2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that define a relationship query table name.

[Guid("7042B894-FB07-4BC4-917D-15E282BA1B27")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRelQueryTableName2

Properties

DoNotPushJoinToDB

Indicates if the join is processed on the client.

bool DoNotPushJoinToDB { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

FireRowChangedEvents

Indicates if Fire row changed events.

bool FireRowChangedEvents { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ForwardDirection

Indicates if the originPrimaryClass of the RelationshipClass is the SourceTable.

bool ForwardDirection { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

LeftOuterJoin

Indicates if the type of join will be a left outer join.

bool LeftOuterJoin { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

RelationshipClassName

The name object for the RelationshipClass that defines the RelQueryTable.

IName RelationshipClassName { get; set; }

Property Value

IName

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<FONT face=Verdana size=2>A <STRONG>RelationshipClassName</STRONG> identifies and locates a relationship class in a workspace and supports obtaining some key properties of the feature class without having to open (instantiate) it.</FONT> <P></P>

SrcQueryFilter

A QueryFilter applied to a cursor opened from the RelQueryTable.

IQueryFilter SrcQueryFilter { get; set; }

Property Value

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

SrcSelectionSet

A SelectionSet applied to a cursor opened from the RelQueryTable.

ISelectionSet SrcSelectionSet { get; set; }

Property Value

ISelectionSet

Examples

Sample Snippet

TargetColumns

The destination dataset columns available in a cursor opened from the RelTableTable.

string TargetColumns { get; set; }

Property Value

string
